{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
# FazoLuxe Launcher - Starts server, tunnel, and browser

# Get the directory where this script lives, then find the project root
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$SCRIPT_DIR/../../.."
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"

# Kill any existing processes on port 8000
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Start the FastAPI server in background
echo "🚀 Starting FazoLuxe Server..."
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"
python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server to be ready
echo "⏳ Waiting for server..."
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    if curl -s http://localhost:8000/ > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "✅ Server is ready!"
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Check if cloudflared is available
if command -v cloudflared &> /dev/null; then
    echo "🌐 Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
    # Start cloudflared tunnel and capture the URL
    cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tee /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log &
    TUNNEL_PID=$!
    
    # Wait for tunnel URL
    TUNNEL_URL=""
    for i in $(seq 1 60); do
        TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*\.trycloudflare\.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
        if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
            break
        fi
        sleep 1
    done
    
    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        echo "🌍 Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL"
        open "$TUNNEL_URL"
    else
        echo "⚠️  Tunnel URL not found, opening local..."
        open "http://localhost:8000"
    fi
else
    echo "⚠️  cloudflared not found, opening local URL..."
    open "http://localhost:8000"
fi

# Show a dialog with info
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe Server is running!\n\nPress OK to stop the server." with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"Stop Server"} default button "Stop Server" with icon note' 2>/dev/null

# Cleanup on exit
echo "🛑 Stopping FazoLuxe..."
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
kill $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
echo "✅ Stopped."","isOutsideWorkspace":false,"isProtected":false,"id":"unified_1775112925932_write_0","diff":"@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# FazoLuxe Launcher - Starts server, tunnel, and browser
+
+# Get the directory where this script lives, then find the project root
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
+PROJECT_ROOT="$SCRIPT_DIR/../../.."
+cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
+
+# Kill any existing processes on port 8000
+lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
+sleep 1
+
+# Start the FastAPI server in background
+echo "🚀 Starting FazoLuxe Server..."
+cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"
+python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
+SERVER_PID=$!
+
+# Wait for server to be ready
+echo "⏳ Waiting for server..."
+for i in $(seq 1 30); do
+    if curl -s http://localhost:8000/ > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+        echo "✅ Server is ready!"
+        break
+    fi
+    sleep 1
+done
+
+# Check if cloudflared is available
+if command -v cloudflared &> /dev/null; then
+    echo "🌐 Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
+    # Start cloudflared tunnel and capture the URL
+    cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tee /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log &
+    TUNNEL_PID=$!
+    
+    # Wait for tunnel URL
+    TUNNEL_URL=""
+    for i in $(seq 1 60); do
+        TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*\.trycloudflare\.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+        if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
+            break
+        fi
+        sleep 1
+    done
+    
+    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
+        echo "🌍 Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL"
+        open "$TUNNEL_URL"
+    else
+        echo "⚠️  Tunnel URL not found, opening local..."
+        open "http://localhost:8000"
+    fi
+else
+    echo "⚠️  cloudflared not found, opening local URL..."
+    open "http://localhost:8000"
+fi
+
+# Show a dialog with info
+osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe Server is running!\n\nPress OK to stop the server." with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"Stop Server"} default button "Stop Server" with icon note' 2>/dev/null
+
+# Cleanup on exit
+echo "🛑 Stopping FazoLuxe..."
+kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
+kill $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null
+lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
+echo "✅ Stopped."

We are building a DMG for the FazoLuxe app. The DMG has been created and is 19K in size.
 However, note that the DMG is very small (19K) because it only contains the .app bundle (which is just a shell script and Info.plist).
 The actual project (backend, frontend, etc.) is not included in the DMG. The launcher script expects to find the project at a relative path (three levels up from the script's location).

 This means that the DMG is not self-contained. The user must have the project at the expected location for the app to work.

 Alternatively, we can change the approach: instead of having the launcher script reference the project at a relative path, we can bundle the entire project inside the .app.

 But note: the project is large (with node_modules, python dependencies, etc.). We don't want to bundle everything.

 Another approach: the DMG can include the project folder and the .app, and the launcher script can be adjusted to use the project folder in the same directory as the .app.

 However, the user's request is: "serverni bittada ishga tushurish uchun maga .dmg yasab ber nomi FazoLuxe.dmg bolsin uni ishga tushirsan web sayt ochilib shu qilyotgan loyihamiz butun internetda local emas online ishga tushadigon bolsin"

 This means: create a DMG that when run, starts the server and makes it available online (not just local).

 Our current launcher does:
  1. Start the FastAPI server on port 8000.
  2. Start a cloudflared tunnel to make it available online.

 But the project is not included in the DMG. We have two options:

 Option 1: Change the launcher to expect the project in a specific location (like the user's Desktop) and adjust the script accordingly.

 Option 2: Bundle the entire project (or at least the necessary parts) in the DMG.

 Since the project is large and has many dependencies (Python, Node.js, etc.), bundling everything is complex.

 Let's reconsider: the user wants to run the server and have it accessible online. The DMG should be a one-click solution.

 We can do:

  1. The DMG contains:

The problem is clear. When accessing via Cloudflare Tunnel (e.g., `https://heated-vancouver-clicks-ears.trycloudflare.com`), the frontend tries to connect to `http://hostname:8000` which won't work because:

1. The browser is on a different machine (or accessing remotely)
2. Port 8000 is not exposed publicly - only the tunnel URL is
3. The API calls should go to the same origin as the page

The fix: Change all `http://${window.location.hostname}:8000` to use relative URLs or `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}` (same origin). Since the backend serves the frontend, using relative URLs or same-origin will work both locally and via tunnel.

"""FazoLuxe Launcher - GUI App with server status"""
import subprocess
import threading
import time
import os
import sys
import re
import webbrowser
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import font as tkfont

SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "..", "..", ".."))
VENV_PYTHON = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "backend", "venv", "bin", "python3")
BACKEND_DIR = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "backend")

class FazoLuxeLauncher:
    def __init__(self):
        self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.server_running = False

        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("FazoLuxe")
        self.root.geometry("520x420")
        self.root.resizable(False, False)
        self.root.configure(bg="#0f172a")
        self.root.protocol("WM_DELETE_WINDOW", self.on_close)

        # Try to set app icon
        try:
            self.root.iconname("FazoLuxe")
        except:
            pass

        self.build_ui()
        self.update_status("idle", "Server to'xtatilgan")

    def build_ui(self):
        # Title
        title_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=22, weight="bold")
        subtitle_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=10)
        status_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=13, weight="bold")
        url_font = tkfont.Font(family="Courier", size=11)
        btn_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=12, weight="bold")
        log_font = tkfont.Font(family="Courier", size=9)

        # Header
        header = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(25, 5))

        tk.Label(header, text="⚡ FazoLuxe", font=title_font,
                 fg="#00d2ff", bg="#0f172a").pack(anchor="w")
        tk.Label(header, text="Industrial Monitoring Dashboard", font=subtitle_font,
                 fg="#64748b", bg="#0f172a").pack(anchor="w")

        # Separator
        tk.Frame(self.root, height=1, bg="#1e293b").pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=10)

        # Status section
        status_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        status_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30)

        # Status indicator
        self.status_container = tk.Frame(status_frame, bg="#0f172a")
        self.status_container.pack(fill="x")

        self.status_dot = tk.Canvas(self.status_container, width=16, height=16,
                                     bg="#0f172a", highlightthickness=0)
        self.status_dot.pack(side="left", padx=(0, 8))
        self.dot_id = self.status_dot.create_oval(2, 2, 14, 14, fill="#ef4444", outline="")

        self.status_label = tk.Label(self.status_container, text="Server to'xtatilgan",
                                      font=status_font, fg="#ef4444", bg="#0f172a")
        self.status_label.pack(side="left")

        # URL section
        self.url_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0, relief="flat")
        self.url_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(12, 0))

        self.url_inner = tk.Frame(self.url_frame, bg="#1e293b")
        self.url_inner.pack(fill="x", padx=15, pady=10)

        tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Online URL:", font=subtitle_font,
                 fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b").pack(anchor="w")

        self.url_label = tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Kutilmoqda...",
                                   font=url_font, fg="#94a3b8", bg="#1e293b",
                                   cursor="hand2", anchor="w")
        self.url_label.pack(anchor="w", pady=(4, 0))
        self.url_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.open_browser())

        # Buttons
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        btn_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(18, 0))

        self.start_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="▶  Ishga Tushurish",
                                    font=btn_font, fg="#0f172a", bg="#00d2ff",
                                    activebackground="#38bdf8", activeforeground="#0f172a",
                                    bd=0, padx=20, pady=12, cursor="hand2",
                                    command=self.start_server)
        self.start_btn.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=(0, 5))

        self.stop_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="⬛  To'xtatish",
                                   font=btn_font, fg="#fff", bg="#ef4444",
                                   activebackground="#f87171", activeforeground="#fff",
                                   bd=0, padx=20, pady=12, cursor="hand2",
                                   command=self.stop_server, state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=(5, 0))

        # Open browser button
        self.browser_btn = tk.Button(self.root, text="🌐  Brauzerda Ochish",
                                      font=btn_font, fg="#0f172a", bg="#22c55e",
                                      activebackground="#4ade80", activeforeground="#0f172a",
                                      bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                      command=self.open_browser, state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(10, 0))

        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=(15, 15))

        self.log_text = tk.Text(log_frame, font=log_font, fg="#64748b", bg="#0a0f1a",
                                 bd=0, highlightthickness=1, highlightbackground="#1e293b",
                                 wrap="word", height=5, state="disabled")
        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"> {msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, state, text):
        colors = {
            "idle": ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"),
            "starting": ("#f59e0b", "#f59e0b"),
            "running": ("#22c55e", "#22c55e"),
            "tunneling": ("#00d2ff", "#00d2ff"),
            "error": ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"),
        }
        dot_color, text_color = colors.get(state, ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"))
        self.status_dot.itemconfig(self.dot_id, fill=dot_color)
        self.status_label.config(text=text, fg=text_color)

    def start_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")

        threading.Thread(target=self._start_server_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _start_server_thread(self):
        try:
            # Kill existing
            subprocess.run(["lsof", "-ti:8000"], capture_output=True)
            os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
            time.sleep(1)

            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmoqda...")

            # Start uvicorn
            self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app",
                 "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                cwd=BACKEND_DIR,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            # Wait for server
            for i in range(30):
                try:
                    import urllib.request
                    urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:8000/", timeout=1)
                    break
                except:
                    time.sleep(1)

            if self.server_proc.poll() is not None:
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", "Server xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                return

            self.server_running = True
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti ✅")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server http://localhost:8000 da ishlayapti")

            # Start cloudflare tunnel
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "tunneling", "Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")

            tunnel_log = "/tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log"
            os.system(f"rm -f {tunnel_log}")

            self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                stdout=open(tunnel_log, "w"),
                stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            # Wait for tunnel URL
            for i in range(60):
                try:
                    with open(tunnel_log, "r") as f:
                        content = f.read()
                    match = re.search(r'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com', content)
                    if match:
                        self.tunnel_url = match.group(0)
                        break
                except:
                    pass
                time.sleep(1)

            if self.tunnel_url:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Online URL: {self.tunnel_url}")
                self.root.after(0, self.url_label.config, {"text": self.tunnel_url, fg": "#00d2ff"})
                self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.config, {"state": "normal"})
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", f"Online: {self.tunnel_url}")
                # Auto-open browser
                webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
            else:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Tunnel URL topilmadi, local URL ochiladi")
                self.root.after(0, self.url_label.config, {"text": "http://localhost:8000", "fg": "#f59e0b"})
                self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.config, {"state": "normal"})
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti (local)")
                webbrowser.open("http://localhost:8000")

        except Exception as e:
            self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")

    def stop_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")

        if self.tunnel_proc:
            try:
                self.tunnel_proc.terminate()
            except:
                pass
        if self.server_proc:
            try:
                self.server_proc.terminate()
            except:
                pass

        os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
        self.server_running = False
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")
        self.update_status("idle", "Server to'xtatilgan")
        self.log("Server to'xtatildi")

    def open_browser(self):
        url = self.tunnel_url or "http://localhost:8000"
        webbrowser.open(url)

    def on_close(self):
        self.stop_server()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

        self.url_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0, relief="flat")
        self.url_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(12, 0))

        tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Online URL:", font=subtitle_font,

        self.url_label = tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Kutilmoqda...",
                                   font=url_font, fg="#94a3b8", bg="#1e293b",

        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"> {msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, state, text):
        colors = {
            "idle": ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"),
            "starting": ("#f59e0b", "#f59e0b"),
            "running": ("#22c55e", "#22c55e"),
            "tunneling": ("#00d2ff", "#00d2ff"),
            "error": ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"),
        }
        dot_color, text_color = colors.get(state, ("#ef4444", "#ef4444"))
        self.status_dot.itemconfig(self.dot_id, fill=dot_color)
        self.status_label.config(text=text, fg=text_color)

    def start_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")

        threading.Thread(target=self._start_server_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _start_server_thread(self):
        try:
            # Kill existing
            subprocess.run(["lsof", "-ti:8000"], capture_output=True)
            os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
            time.sleep(1)

            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmoqda...")

            # Start uvicorn
            self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app",
                 "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                cwd=BACKEND_DIR,
                stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            # Wait for server
            for i in range(30):
                try:
                    import urllib.request
                    urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:8000/", timeout=1)
                    break
                except:
                    time.sleep(1)

            if self.server_proc.poll() is not None:
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", "Server xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                return

            self.server_running = True
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti ✅")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server http://localhost:8000 da ishlayapti")

            # Start cloudflare tunnel
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "tunneling", "Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")

            tunnel_log = "/tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log"
            os.system(f"rm -f {tunnel_log}")

            self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                stdout=open(tunnel_log, "w"),
                stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            # Wait for tunnel URL
            for i in range(60):
                try:
                    with open(tunnel_log, "r") as f:
                        content = f.read()
                    match = re.search(r'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com', content)
                    if match:
                        self.tunnel_url = match.group(0)
                        break
                except:
                    pass
                time.sleep(1)

            if self.tunnel_url:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Online URL: {self.tunnel_url}")
                self.root.after(0, self.url_label.config, {"text": self.tunnel_url, fg": "#00d2ff"})
                self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.config, {"state": "normal"})
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", f"Online: {self.tunnel_url}")
                # Auto-open browser
                webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
            else:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Tunnel URL topilmadi, local URL ochiladi")
                self.root.after(0, self.url_label.config, {"text": "http://localhost:8000", "fg": "#f59e0b"})
                self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.config, {"state": "normal"})
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti (local)")
                webbrowser.open("http://localhost:8000")

        except Exception as e:
            self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")

    def stop_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")

        if self.tunnel_proc:
            try:
                self.tunnel_proc.terminate()
            except:
                pass
        if self.server_proc:
            try:
                self.server_proc.terminate()
            except:
                pass

        os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
        self.server_running = False
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")
        self.update_status("idle", "Server to'xtatilgan")
        self.log("Server to'xtatildi")

    def open_browser(self):
        url = self.tunnel_url or "http://localhost:8000"
        webbrowser.open(url)

    def on_close(self):
        self.stop_server()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.py","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""FazoLuxe Launcher - GUI App with server status"""
import subprocess
import threading
import time
import os
import sys
import re
import webbrowser
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import font as tkfont

SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
PROJECT_ROOT = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "..", "..", ".."))
VENV_PYTHON = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "backend", "venv", "bin", "python3")
BACKEND_DIR = os.path.join(PROJECT_ROOT, "backend")

class FazoLuxeLauncher:
    def __init__(self):
        self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.server_running = False

        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("FazoLuxe")
        self.root.geometry("520x450")
        self.root.resizable(False, False)
        self.root.configure(bg="#0f172a")
        self.root.protocol("WM_DELETE_WINDOW", self.on_close)

        self.build_ui()
        self.update_status("idle", "Server to'xtatilgan")

    def build_ui(self):
        title_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=22, weight="bold")
        subtitle_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=10)
        status_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=13, weight="bold")
        url_font = tkfont.Font(family="Courier", size=11)
        btn_font = tkfont.Font(family="Helvetica", size=12, weight="bold")
        log_font = tkfont.Font(family="Courier", size=9)

        header = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(25, 5))
        tk.Label(header, text="⚡ FazoLuxe", font=title_font, fg="#00d2ff", bg="#0f172a").pack(anchor="w")
        tk.Label(header, text="Industrial Monitoring Dashboard", font=subtitle_font, fg="#64748b", bg="#0f172a").pack(anchor="w")

        tk.Frame(self.root, height=1, bg="#1e293b").pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=10)

        status_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        status_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30)
        self.status_container = tk.Frame(status_frame, bg="#0f172a")
        self.status_container.pack(fill="x")
        self.status_dot = tk.Canvas(self.status_container, width=16, height=16, bg="#0f172a", highlightthickness=0)
        self.status_dot.pack(side="left", padx=(0, 8))
        self.dot_id = self.status_dot.create_oval(2, 2, 14, 14, fill="#ef4444", outline="")
        self.status_label = tk.Label(self.status_container, text="Server to'xtatilgan", font=status_font, fg="#ef4444", bg="#0f172a")
        self.status_label.pack(side="left")

        self.url_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0, relief="flat")
        self.url_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(12, 0))
        self.url_inner = tk.Frame(self.url_frame, bg="#1e293b")
        self.url_inner.pack(fill="x", padx=15, pady=10)
        tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Online URL:", font=subtitle_font, fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b").pack(anchor="w")
        self.url_label = tk.Label(self.url_inner, text="Kutilmoqda...", font=url_font, fg="#94a3b8", bg="#1e293b", cursor="hand2", anchor="w")
        self.url_label.pack(anchor="w", pady=(4, 0))
        self.url_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.open_browser())

        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        btn_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(18, 0))
        self.start_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="▶  Ishga Tushurish", font=btn_font, fg="#0f172a", bg="#00d2ff", activebackground="#38bdf8", activeforeground="#0f172a", bd=0, padx=20, pady=12, cursor="hand2", command=self.start_server)
        self.start_btn.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=(0, 5))
        self.stop_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="⬛  To'xtatish", font=btn_font, fg="#fff", bg="#ef4444", activebackground="#f87171", activeforeground="#fff", bd=0, padx=20, pady=12, cursor="hand2", command=self.stop_server, state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=(5, 0))

        self.browser_btn = tk.Button(self.root, text="🌐  Brauzerda Ochish", font=btn_font, fg="#0f172a", bg="#22c55e", activebackground="#4ade80", activeforeground="#0f172a", bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2", command=self.open_browser, state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(10, 0))

        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=(15, 15))
        self.log_text = tk.Text(log_frame, font=log_font, fg="#64748b", bg="#0a0f1a", bd=0, highlightthickness=1, highlightbackground="#1e293b", wrap="word", height=5, state="disabled")
        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"> {msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, state, text):
        colors = {"idle": "#ef4444", "starting": "#f59e0b", "running": "#22c55e", "tunneling": "#00d2ff", "error": "#ef4444"}
        color = colors.get(state, "#ef4444")
        self.status_dot.itemconfig(self.dot_id, fill=color)
        self.status_label.config(text=text, fg=color)

    def start_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")
        threading.Thread(target=self._start_server_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _start_server_thread(self):
        try:
            os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
            time.sleep(1)

            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmoqda...")

            self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                cwd=BACKEND_DIR, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            for i in range(30):
                try:
                    import urllib.request
                    urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:8000/", timeout=1)
                    break
                except:
                    time.sleep(1)

            if self.server_proc.poll() is not None:
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", "Server xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                return

            self.server_running = True
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti ✅")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server http://localhost:8000 da ishlayapti")
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "tunneling", "Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
            self.root.after(0, self.log, "Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")

            tunnel_log = "/tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log"
            os.system(f"rm -f {tunnel_log}")

            self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                stdout=open(tunnel_log, "w"), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
            )

            for i in range(60):
                try:
                    with open(tunnel_log, "r") as f:
                        content = f.read()
                    match = re.search(r'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com', content)
                    if match:
                        self.tunnel_url = match.group(0)
                        break
                except:
                    pass
                time.sleep(1)

            if self.tunnel_url:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Online URL: {self.tunnel_url}")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.url_label.config(text=self.tunnel_url, fg="#00d2ff"))
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.browser_btn.config(state="normal"))
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", f"Online ✅")
                webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
            else:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, "Tunnel URL topilmadi, local URL ochiladi")
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.url_label.config(text="http://localhost:8000", fg="#f59e0b"))
                self.root.after(0, lambda: self.browser_btn.config(state="normal"))
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", "Server ishlayapti (local)")
                webbrowser.open("http://localhost:8000")

        except Exception as e:
            self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")
            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "error", f"Xatolik: {str(e)}")

    def stop_server(self):
        self.start_btn.config(state="normal")
        self.stop_btn.config(state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.config(state="disabled")

        if self.tunnel_proc:
            try: self.tunnel_proc.terminate()
            except: pass
        if self.server_proc:
            try: self.server_proc.terminate()
            except: pass

        os.system("lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null")
        self.server_running = False
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.url_label.config(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#94a3b8")
        self.update_status("idle", "Server to'xtatilgan")
        self.log("Server to'xtatildi")

    def open_browser(self):
        url = self.tunnel_url or "http://localhost:8000"
        webbrowser.open(url)

    def on_close(self):
        self.stop_server()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = FazoLuxeLauncher()
    app.run()","isOutsideWorkspace":false,"isProtected":false,"id":"unified_1775116378841_write_0"}

We are going to create a proper macOS .app bundle that uses the Python GUI launcher.
 Steps:
 1. Update the FazoLuxeLauncher.sh to call the Python GUI launcher.
 2. Update the Info.plist to use the shell script as the executable (which then calls the Python script).
 3. Rebuild the DMG.

 However, note that the user wants a GUI app that shows the server status. We already have a Python GUI launcher.
 We need to make sure the .app bundle runs the Python script with the correct environment.

 Let's update the shell script to activate the virtual environment and then run the Python GUI launcher.

 But note: the Python GUI launcher (FazoLuxeLauncher.py) already uses the virtual environment's Python (VENV_PYTHON).
 However, we are in a macOS app bundle, so we need to make sure the shell script sets up the environment correctly.

 Alternatively, we can change the shell script to just run the Python script with the system Python, but the Python script
 already uses the virtual environment's Python for the server. However, the GUI itself (tkinter) might not be available
 in the virtual environment. We should use the system Python for the GUI and the virtual environment's Python for the server.

 Let's adjust the approach:

 We'll have the shell script run the Python script with the system Python (or the one that has tkinter).
 The Python script (FazoLuxeLauncher.py) will use the virtual environment's Python for the server subprocess.

 But note: the virtual environment's Python might not have tkinter. So we must run the GUI with a Python that has tkinter.

 We can do:

   #!/bin/bash
   # Activate the virtual environment for the server, but run the GUI with system Python

   # Get the directory of this script
   DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )"
   PROJECT_ROOT="$DIR/../../.."

   # Run the Python GUI launcher with the system Python (which has tkinter)

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$DIR/../../.." && pwd)"

# Kill any existing processes on port 8000
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Start the FastAPI server in background
echo "🚀 Starting FazoLuxe Server..."
source "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/activate"
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"
python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server to start
echo "⏳ Waiting for server..."
for i in {1..30}; do
    if curl -s http://localhost:8000/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "✅ Server is running on http://localhost:8000"
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Start Cloudflare tunnel
echo "🌐 Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tee /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
echo "⏳ Getting online URL..."
for i in {1..60}; do
    if grep -q 'trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null; then
        TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*\.trycloudflare\.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log | head -1)
        if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
            echo ""
            echo "========================================"
            echo "✅ FazoLuxe is ONLINE!"
            echo "🔗 URL: $TUNNEL_URL"
            echo "========================================"
            echo ""
            echo "Login: SvRvS3003 / Saidakbar3003!"
            echo ""
            echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop the server"
            echo ""
            # Open browser
            open "$TUNNEL_URL"
            break
        fi
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# If no tunnel URL found, open local
if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    echo "⚠️  Tunnel URL not found, opening local URL"
    open "http://localhost:8000"
fi

# Wait for Ctrl+C
trap 'echo ""; echo "🛑 Stopping server..."; kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; kill $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo "✅ Server stopped"; exit 0' INT TERM

# Keep script running

DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$DIR/../../.." && pwd)"

# Kill any existing processes on port 8000
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Start the FastAPI server in background
echo "🚀 Starting FazoLuxe Server..."
source "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/activate"
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"
python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server to start
echo "⏳ Waiting for server..."
for i in {1..30}; do
    if curl -s http://localhost:8000/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "✅ Server is running on http://localhost:8000"
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Start Cloudflare tunnel
echo "🌐 Starting Cloudflare Tunnel..."
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tee /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
echo "⏳ Getting online URL..."
for i in {1..60}; do
    if grep -q 'trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null; then
        TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*\.trycloudflare\.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log | head -1)
        if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
            echo ""
            echo "========================================"
            echo "✅ FazoLuxe is ONLINE!"
            echo "🔗 URL: $TUNNEL_URL"
            echo "========================================"
            echo ""
            echo "Login: SvRvS3003 / Saidakbar3003!"
            echo ""
            echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop the server"
            echo ""
            # Open browser
            open "$TUNNEL_URL"
            break
        fi
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# If no tunnel URL found, open local
if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    echo "⚠️  Tunnel URL not found, opening local URL"
    open "http://localhost:8000"
fi

# Wait for Ctrl+C
trap 'echo ""; echo "🛑 Stopping server..."; kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; kill $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo "✅ Server stopped"; exit 0' INT TERM

# Keep script running

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$DIR/../../.." && pwd)"
VENV_PYTHON="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/python3"
BACKEND_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"

# Kill old processes
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "cloudflared tunnel" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Show starting dialog
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe server ishga tushmoqda...\n\nIltimos kuting (10-15 soniya)" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" giving up after 3 with icon note' &

# Start backend server
cd "$BACKEND_DIR"
"$VENV_PYTHON" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server
echo "Waiting for server..."
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    if curl -s -o /dev/null -w '' http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Check if server started
if ! curl -s -o /dev/null -w '' http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Server ishga tushmadi!\n\nLog: /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log" with title "FazoLuxe Xatolik" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon stop'
    exit 1
fi

# Start cloudflare tunnel
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>&1 &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
echo "Waiting for tunnel..."
TUNNEL_URL=""
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*.trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$DIR/../../.." && pwd)"
VENV_PYTHON="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/python3"
BACKEND_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"

# Kill old processes
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "cloudflared tunnel" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Show starting dialog
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe server ishga tushmoqda...\n\nIltimos kuting (10-15 soniya)" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" giving up after 3 with icon note' &

# Start backend server
cd "$BACKEND_DIR"
"$VENV_PYTHON" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server
echo "Waiting for server..."
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    if curl -s -o /dev/null -w '' http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Check if server started
if ! curl -s -o /dev/null -w '' http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Server ishga tushmadi!\n\nLog: /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log" with title "FazoLuxe Xatolik" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon stop'
    exit 1
fi

# Start cloudflare tunnel
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>&1 &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
echo "Waiting for tunnel..."
TUNNEL_URL=""
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*.trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Tunnel yaratilmadi!\n\nLocal: http://localhost:8000\n\nLog: /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon caution'
    open "http://localhost:8000"
else
    # Show success dialog with URL
    osascript -e "display dialog \"✅ FazoLuxe ishga tushdi!

🌐 Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL

Login: SvRvS3003
Parol: Saidakbar3003!

Brauzerda ochiladi...\" with title \"FazoLuxe - Online\" buttons {\"Brauzerni ochish\", \"Yopish\"} default button \"Brauzerni ochish\" with icon note" > /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>&1
    
    RESULT=$(cat /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>/dev/null)
    if echo "$RESULT" | grep -q "Brauzerni ochish"; then
        open "$TUNNEL_URL"
    fi
fi

# Keep running - wait for user to quit
echo "Server running. Press Ctrl+C to stop."
echo "Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL"
echo "Local URL: http://localhost:8000"

# Trap to cleanup on exit
trap "kill $SERVER_PID $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null" EXIT

wait $SERVER_PID","isOutsideWorkspace":false,"isProtected":false,"id":"unified_1775118420858_write_0"}

The problem is clear: when the app is launched from the DMG (mounted at `/Volumes/FazoLuxe 3/`), the `PROJECT_ROOT` path resolves to `/Volumes/FazoLuxe 3/` instead of the actual project directory. The script needs to find the actual project root, not the DMG mount point.

The solution is to make the launcher script find the actual project directory. Since the DMG is just a wrapper, I need to either:
1. Embed the full path to the project in the script
2. Or use a different approach - make the app self-contained

The best approach is to hardcode the project path in the launcher since this is a personal deployment tool.
Problem found! DMG mount path (`/Volumes/FazoLuxe 3/`) is being used instead of actual project path. I need to hardcode the real project path.

The problem is that when the DMG is mounted, the PROJECT_ROOT path is wrong. The script tries to find the project root relative to the app location, but when the app is on the DMG volume, it can't find the venv.

I need to make the launcher script work regardless of where the app is located. The best approach is to use a fixed absolute path to the project directory.

Let me rewrite the launcher script to use hardcoded paths to the actual project location.

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash

# Fixed paths to actual project
PROJECT_ROOT="/Users/user/Desktop/SR"
VENV_PYTHON="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/python3"
BACKEND_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"

# Kill old processes
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "cloudflared tunnel" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Show starting dialog
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe server ishga tushmoqda...\n\nIltimos kuting (10-15 soniya)" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" giving up after 3 with icon note' &

# Start backend server
cd "$BACKEND_DIR"
"$VENV_PYTHON" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    if curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Check if server started
if ! curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Server ishga tushmadi!\n\nLog: /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log" with title "FazoLuxe Xatolik" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon stop'
    exit 1
fi

# Start cloudflare tunnel
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>&1 &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
TUNNEL_URL=""
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*.trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Tunnel yaratilmadi!\n\nLocal: http://localhost:8000" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon caution'
    open "http://localhost:8000"
else
    osascript -e "display dialog \"FazoLuxe ishga tushdi!

Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL

Login: SvRvS3003
Parol: Saidakbar3003!\" with title \"FazoLuxe - Online\" buttons {\"Brauzerni ochish\", \"Yopish\"} default button \"Brauzerni ochish\" with icon note" > /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>&1

    RESULT=$(cat /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>/dev/null)
    if echo "$RESULT" | grep -q "Brauzerni ochish"; then
        open "$TUNNEL_URL"
    fi
fi

# Keep running
trap "kill $SERVER_PID $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null" EXIT

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash

# FazoLuxe Launcher - Fixed paths
PROJECT_ROOT="/Users/user/Desktop/SR"
VENV_PYTHON="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/python3"
BACKEND_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"

# Kill old processes
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "cloudflared tunnel" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Show starting dialog
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe server ishga tushmoqda...\n\nIltimos kuting (10-15 soniya)" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" giving up after 3 with icon note' &

# Start backend server
cd "$BACKEND_DIR"
"$VENV_PYTHON" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!

# Wait for server
echo "Waiting for server..."
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    if curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "Server started!"
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

# Check if server started
if ! curl -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Server ishga tushmadi!\n\nLog: /tmp/fazoluxe_server.log" with title "FazoLuxe Xatolik" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon stop'
    exit 1
fi

# Start cloudflare tunnel
cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:8000 > /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>&1 &
TUNNEL_PID=$!

# Wait for tunnel URL
TUNNEL_URL=""
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
    TUNNEL_URL=$(grep -o 'https://[a-z0-9-]*.trycloudflare.com' /tmp/fazoluxe_tunnel.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Tunnel yaratilmadi!\n\nLocal: http://localhost:8000" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon caution'
    open "http://localhost:8000"
else
    osascript -e "display dialog \"FazoLuxe ishga tushdi!

Online URL: $TUNNEL_URL

Login: SvRvS3003
Parol: Saidakbar3003!\" with title \"FazoLuxe - Online\" buttons {\"Brauzerni ochish\", \"Yopish\"} default button \"Brauzerni ochish\" with icon note" > /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>&1

    RESULT=$(cat /tmp/fazoluxe_dialog.txt 2>/dev/null)
    if echo "$RESULT" | grep -q "Brauzerni ochish"; then
        open "$TUNNEL_URL"
    fi
fi

# Keep running
trap "kill $SERVER_PID $TUNNEL_PID 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null" EXIT

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash

# FazoLuxe Launcher
# Auto-detect project root (works from DMG or local)
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

# Try to find project root
if [ -f "/Users/user/Desktop/SR/backend/venv/bin/python3" ]; then
    PROJECT_ROOT="/Users/user/Desktop/SR"
elif [ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../backend/venv/bin/python3" ]; then
    PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../" && pwd)"
else
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Loyiha fayllari topilmadi!\n\nIltimos FazoLuxe papkasini Desktop ga joylang." with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon stop'
    exit 1
fi

VENV_PYTHON="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend/venv/bin/python3"
BACKEND_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/backend"

# Kill old processes
lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "cloudflared tunnel" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1

# Show starting dialog
osascript -e 'display dialog "FazoLuxe server ishga tushmoqda...\n\nIltimos kuting (10-15 soniya)" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" giving up after 3 with icon note' &

    sleep 1
done

    if [ -n "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 1
done

if [ -z "$TUNNEL_URL" ]; then
    osascript -e 'display dialog "Tunnel yaratilmadi!\n\nLocal: http://localhost:8000" with title "FazoLuxe" buttons {"OK"} default button "OK" with icon caution'
    open "http://localhost:8000"

{"tool":"newFileCreated","path":"FazoLuxe.app/Contents/MacOS/FazoLuxeLauncher.py","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3
import subprocess
import sys
import os
import time
import threading
import webbrowser
import signal
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
RESOURCES_DIR = os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "..", "Resources")
VENV_PYTHON = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "backend", "venv", "bin", "python3")
BACKEND_DIR = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "backend")
FRONTEND_DIST = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "frontend_dist")
DB_PATH = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "industrial_dashboard.db")

class FazoLuxeApp:
    def __init__(self):
        self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.running = False

        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("FazoLuxe Dashboard")
        self.root.geometry("520x520")
        self.root.configure(bg="#0f172a")
        self.root.resizable(False, False)

        # Header
        header = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=(20, 10))
        tk.Label(header, text="FazoLuxe", font=("Helvetica", 28, "bold"),
                 fg="#00d2ff", bg="#0f172a").pack()
        tk.Label(header, text="Industrial Monitoring Dashboard",
                 font=("Helvetica", 11), fg="#64748b", bg="#0f172a").pack()

        # Status
        status_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0, relief="flat")
        status_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=10)
        status_inner = tk.Frame(status_frame, bg="#1e293b")
        status_inner.pack(pady=15)
        self.status_indicator = tk.Label(status_inner, text="●", font=("Helvetica", 20),
                                         fg="#ef4444", bg="#1e293b")
        self.status_indicator.pack(side="left", padx=(0, 10))
        self.status_label = tk.Label(status_inner, text="Server to'xtatilgan",
                                     font=("Helvetica", 14, "bold"),
                                     fg="#e2e8f0", bg="#1e293b")
        self.status_label.pack(side="left")

        # URL
        url_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0)
        url_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=5)
        tk.Label(url_frame, text="Online URL:", font=("Helvetica", 9),
                 fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b").pack(pady=(10, 0))
        self.url_label = tk.Label(url_frame, text="Kutilmoqda...",
                                  font=("Helvetica", 11, "bold"),
                                  fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b", cursor="hand2")
        self.url_label.pack(pady=(0, 10))
        self.url_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.open_browser())

        # Log
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=20, pady=5)
        self.log_text = tk.Text(log_frame, bg="#0f172a", fg="#94a3b8",
                                font=("Courier", 9), bd=0, wrap="word",
                                state="disabled", height=6)
        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        # Buttons
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        btn_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=(5, 20))

        self.start_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="▶  Ishga Tushirish",
                                   font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                   bg="#00d2ff", fg="#0f172a",
                                   activebackground="#38bdf8",
                                   bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                   command=self.start_server)
        self.start_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(0, 5))

        self.browser_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="🌐  Brauzerni Ochish",
                                     font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                     bg="#22c55e", fg="#0f172a",
                                     active_background="#4ade80",
                                     bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                     command=self.open_browser, state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.stop_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="⬛  To'xtatish",
                                  font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                  bg="#ef4444", fg="#fff",
                                  activebackground="#f87171",
                                  bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                  command=self.stop_server, state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.root.protocol("WM_DELETE_WINDOW", self.on_close)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"{msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, status, text):
        colors = {"stopped": "#ef4444", "starting": "#f59e0b", "running": "#22c55e"}
        self.status_indicator.configure(fg=colors.get(status, "#ef4444"))
        self.status_label.configure(text=text)

    def start_server(self):
        if self.running:
            return
        self.running = True
        self.start_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.configure(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.update_status("starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
        self.log("Server ishga tushirilmoqda...")

        # Copy DB if not exists
        db_dest = os.path.join(BACKEND_DIR, "industrial_dashboard.db")
        if not os.path.exists(db_dest) and os.path.exists(DB_PATH):
            import shutil
            shutil.copy2(DB_PATH, db_dest)
            self.log("Database nusxalandi")

        # Start uvicorn
        def run_server():
            try:
                self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app",
                     "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                    cwd=BACKEND_DIR,
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.PIPE
                )
                time.sleep(3)
                if self.server_proc.poll() is None:
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server port 8000 da ishga tushdi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.start_tunnel)
                else:
                    err = self.server_proc.stderr.read().decode()
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Server xatoligi: {err}")
                    self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)
            except Exception as e:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {e}")
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)

        threading.Thread(target=run_server, daemon=True).start()

    def start_tunnel(self):
        self.log("Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
        def run_tunnel():
            try:
                self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.STDOUT

When the .app is run from the DMG, the structure will be:

import subprocess
import sys
import os
import time
import threading
import webbrowser
import signal
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import messagebox

SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
RESOURCES_DIR = os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "..", "Resources")
VENV_PYTHON = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "backend", "venv", "bin", "python3")
BACKEND_DIR = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "backend")
FRONTEND_DIST = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "frontend_dist")
DB_PATH = os.path.join(RESOURCES_DIR, "industrial_dashboard.db")

class FazoLuxeApp:
    def __init__(self):
        self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.running = False

        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("FazoLuxe Dashboard")
        self.root.geometry("520x520")
        self.root.configure(bg="#0f172a")
        self.root.resizable(False, False)

        # Header
        header = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=(20, 10))
        tk.Label(header, text="FazoLuxe", font=("Helvetica", 28, "bold"),
                 fg="#00d2ff", bg="#0f172a").pack()
        tk.Label(header, text="Industrial Monitoring Dashboard",
                 font=("Helvetica", 11), fg="#64748b", bg="#0f172a").pack()

        # Status
        status_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0, relief="flat")
        status_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=10)
        status_inner = tk.Frame(status_frame, bg="#1e293b")
        status_inner.pack(pady=15)
        self.status_indicator = tk.Label(status_inner, text="●", font=("Helvetica", 20),
                                         fg="#ef4444", bg="#1e293b")
        self.status_indicator.pack(side="left", padx=(0, 10))
        self.status_label = tk.Label(status_inner, text="Server to'xtatilgan",
                                     font=("Helvetica", 14, "bold"),
                                     fg="#e2e8f0", bg="#1e293b")
        self.status_label.pack(side="left")

        # URL
        url_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#1e293b", bd=0)
        url_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=5)
        tk.Label(url_frame, text="Online URL:", font=("Helvetica", 9),
                 fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b").pack(pady=(10, 0))
        self.url_label = tk.Label(url_frame, text="Kutilmoqda...",
                                  font=("Helvetica", 11, "bold"),
                                  fg="#64748b", bg="#1e293b", cursor="hand2")
        self.url_label.pack(pady=(0, 10))
        self.url_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.open_browser())

        # Log
        log_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=20, pady=5)
        self.log_text = tk.Text(log_frame, bg="#0f172a", fg="#94a3b8",
                                font=("Courier", 9), bd=0, wrap="word",
                                state="disabled", height=6)
        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        # Buttons
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        btn_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=(5, 20))

        self.start_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="▶  Ishga Tushirish",
                                   font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                   bg="#00d2ff", fg="#0f172a",
                                   activebackground="#38bdf8",
                                   bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                   command=self.start_server)
        self.start_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(0, 5))

        self.browser_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="🌐  Brauzerni Ochish",
                                     font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                     bg="#22c55e", fg="#0f172a",
                                     activebackground="#4ade80",
                                     bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                     command=self.open_browser, state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.stop_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="⬛  To'xtatish",
                                  font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                  bg="#ef4444", fg="#fff",
                                  activebackground="#f87171",
                                  bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                  command=self.stop_server, state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.root.protocol("WM_DELETE_WINDOW", self.on_close)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"{msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, status, text):
        colors = {"stopped": "#ef4444", "starting": "#f59e0b", "running": "#22c55e"}
        self.status_indicator.configure(fg=colors.get(status, "#ef4444"))
        self.status_label.configure(text=text)

    def start_server(self):
        if self.running:
            return
        self.running = True
        self.start_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.configure(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.update_status("starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
        self.log("Server ishga tushirilmoqda...")

        # Copy DB if not exists
        db_dest = os.path.join(BACKEND_DIR, "industrial_dashboard.db")
        if not os.path.exists(db_dest) and os.path.exists(DB_PATH):
            import shutil
            shutil.copy2(DB_PATH, db_dest)
            self.log("Database nusxalandi")

        # Start uvicorn
        def run_server():
            try:
                self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app",
                     "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                    cwd=BACKEND_DIR,
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.PIPE
                )
                time.sleep(3)
                if self.server_proc.poll() is None:
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server port 8000 da ishga tushdi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.start_tunnel)
                else:
                    err = self.server_proc.stderr.read().decode()
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Server xatoligi: {err}")
                    self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)
            except Exception as e:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {e}")
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)

        threading.Thread(target=run_server, daemon=True).start()

    def start_tunnel(self):
        self.log("Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
        def run_tunnel():
            try:
                self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
                )
                for line in iter(self.tunnel_proc.stdout.readline, b''):
                    text = line.decode().strip()
                    if "trycloudflare.com" in text:
                        import re
                        match = re.search(r'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com', text)
                        if match:
                            self.tunnel_url = match.group(0)
                            self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Online URL: {self.tunnel_url}")
                            self.root.after(0, self.url_label.configure, {"text": self.tunnel_url, "fg": "#00d2ff"})
                            self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.configure, {"state": "normal"})
                            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", f"Online: {self.tunnel_url}")
                            webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
                            break
            except Exception as e:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Tunnel xatoligi: {e}")

        threading.Thread(target=run_tunnel, daemon=True).start()

    def open_browser(self):
        if self.tunnel_url:
            webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
        else:
            webbrowser.open("http://localhost:8000")

    def stop_server(self):
        self.running = False
        self.log("Server to'xtatilmoqda...")
        if self.tunnel_proc:
            self.tunnel_proc.terminate()
            self.tunnel_proc = None
        if self.server_proc:
            self.server_proc.terminate()
            self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.update_status("stopped", "Server to'xtatilgan")
        self.url_label.configure(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#64748b")
        self.reset_buttons()

    def reset_buttons(self):
        self.start_btn.configure(state="normal")
        self.stop_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.configure(state="disabled")

    def on_close(self):
        if self.running:
            if messagebox.askokcancel("Chiqish", "Serverni to'xtatib chiqasizmi?"):
                self.stop_server()
                self.root.destroy()
        else:
            self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = FazoLuxeApp()

        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=20, pady=5)
        self.log_text = tk.Text(log_frame, bg="#0f172a", fg="#94a3b8",
                                font=("Courier", 9), bd=0, wrap="word",
                                state="disabled", height=6)
        self.log_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        # Buttons
        btn_frame = tk.Frame(self.root, bg="#0f172a")
        btn_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=20, pady=(5, 20))

        self.start_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="▶  Ishga Tushirish",
                                   font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                   bg="#00d2ff", fg="#0f172a",
                                   activebackground="#38bdf8",
                                   bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                   command=self.start_server)
        self.start_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(0, 5))

        self.browser_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="🌐  Brauzerni Ochish",
                                     font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                     bg="#22c55e", fg="#0f172a",
                                     activebackground="#4ade80",
                                     bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                     command=self.open_browser, state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.stop_btn = tk.Button(btn_frame, text="⬛  To'xtatish",
                                  font=("Helvetica", 12, "bold"),
                                  bg="#ef4444", fg="#fff",
                                  activebackground="#f87171",
                                  bd=0, padx=20, pady=10, cursor="hand2",
                                  command=self.stop_server, state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.pack(side="left", expand=True, fill="x", padx=(5, 0))

        self.root.protocol("WM_DELETE_WINDOW", self.on_close)

    def log(self, msg):
        self.log_text.configure(state="normal")
        self.log_text.insert("end", f"{msg}\n")
        self.log_text.see("end")
        self.log_text.configure(state="disabled")

    def update_status(self, status, text):
        colors = {"stopped": "#ef4444", "starting": "#f59e0b", "running": "#22c55e"}
        self.status_indicator.configure(fg=colors.get(status, "#ef4444"))
        self.status_label.configure(text=text)

    def start_server(self):
        if self.running:
            return
        self.running = True
        self.start_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.stop_btn.configure(state="normal")
        self.browser_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.update_status("starting", "Server ishga tushmoqda...")
        self.log("Server ishga tushirilmoqda...")

        # Copy DB if not exists
        db_dest = os.path.join(BACKEND_DIR, "industrial_dashboard.db")
        if not os.path.exists(db_dest) and os.path.exists(DB_PATH):
            import shutil
            shutil.copy2(DB_PATH, db_dest)
            self.log("Database nusxalandi")

        # Start uvicorn
        def run_server():
            try:
                self.server_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    [VENV_PYTHON, "-m", "uvicorn", "app.main:app",
                     "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"],
                    cwd=BACKEND_DIR,
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.PIPE
                )
                time.sleep(3)
                if self.server_proc.poll() is None:
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, "Server port 8000 da ishga tushdi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.start_tunnel)
                else:
                    err = self.server_proc.stderr.read().decode()
                    self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Server xatoligi: {err}")
                    self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Server ishga tushmadi!")
                    self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)
            except Exception as e:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Xatolik: {e}")
                self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "stopped", "Xatolik!")
                self.root.after(0, self.reset_buttons)

        threading.Thread(target=run_server, daemon=True).start()

    def start_tunnel(self):
        self.log("Cloudflare Tunnel yaratilmoqda...")
        def run_tunnel():
            try:
                self.tunnel_proc = subprocess.Popen(
                    ["cloudflared", "tunnel", "--url", "http://localhost:8000"],
                    stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
                    stderr=subprocess.STDOUT
                )
                for line in iter(self.tunnel_proc.stdout.readline, b''):
                    text = line.decode().strip()
                    if "trycloudflare.com" in text:
                        import re
                        match = re.search(r'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com', text)
                        if match:
                            self.tunnel_url = match.group(0)
                            self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Online URL: {self.tunnel_url}")
                            self.root.after(0, self.url_label.configure, {"text": self.tunnel_url, "fg": "#00d2ff"})
                            self.root.after(0, self.browser_btn.configure, {"state": "normal"})
                            self.root.after(0, self.update_status, "running", f"Online: {self.tunnel_url}")
                            webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
                            break
            except Exception as e:
                self.root.after(0, self.log, f"Tunnel xatoligi: {e}")

        threading.Thread(target=run_tunnel, daemon=True).start()

    def open_browser(self):
        if self.tunnel_url:
            webbrowser.open(self.tunnel_url)
        else:
            webbrowser.open("http://localhost:8000")

    def stop_server(self):
        self.running = False
        self.log("Server to'xtatilmoqda...")
        if self.tunnel_proc:
            self.tunnel_proc.terminate()
            self.tunnel_proc = None
        if self.server_proc:
            self.server_proc.terminate()
            self.server_proc = None
        self.tunnel_url = None
        self.update_status("stopped", "Server to'xtatilgan")
        self.url_label.configure(text="Kutilmoqda...", fg="#64748b")
        self.reset_buttons()

    def reset_buttons(self):
        self.start_btn.configure(state="normal")
        self.stop_btn.configure(state="disabled")
        self.browser_btn.configure(state="disabled")

    def on_close(self):
        if self.running:
            if messagebox.askokcancel("Chiqish", "Serverni to'xtatib chiqasizmi?"):
                self.stop_server()
                self.root.destroy()
        else:
            self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()
